riscv64-unknown-elf-gcc -nostdlib -T /usr/local/share/uriscv/uriscvcore.ldscript -march=rv32imfd CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/klog.c.o CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/phase1/pcb.c.o CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/phase1/asl.c.o CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/phase2/src/initial.c.o CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/phase2/src/exceptions.c.o CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/phase2/src/interrupts.c.o CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/phase2/src/scheduler.c.o CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/phase2/src/p2test.c.o CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/phase2/src/syscall.c.o CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/usr/local/share/uriscv/crtso.S.o CMakeFiles/MultiPandOS.dir/usr/local/share/uriscv/liburiscv.S.o -o MultiPandOS
